content.problemStatement: Given three strings `s1`, `s2`, and `s3`, write a recursive function to determine if `s3` can be obtained by interleaving `s1` and `s2`. An interleaving of two strings `s1` and `s2` is a configuration where they are merged in such a way that maintains the left-to-right order of characters from each string.
constraints:
- The length of `s1`, `s2`, and `s3` will be between 0 and 20.
- All strings consist of lowercase English letters only.
content.inputFormat:
- First line of input contains the string `s1`.
- Second line of input contains the string `s2`.
- Third line of input contains the string `s3`.
content.outputFormat: - Output `True` if `s3` can be obtained by interleaving `s1` and `s2`, else `False`.
